title: Royalty Allocation Graph
description: A machine-readable record for allocating revenue across final creators, origin creators, derivative creators, auditors, protocol funds, and other participants based on lineage and audit evidence in the Origin Structure Market.

id.description: A unique identifier for the royalty allocation graph.

revenue_event_id.description: Identifier of the revenue event that triggered this allocation graph.

product_id.description: Identifier of the product, listing, derivative asset, or final output that generated revenue.

product_title.description: Optional human-readable title of the revenue-generating product.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the royalty allocation graph was created.

version.description: Version of this royalty allocation graph record.

currency.description: Currency used for this revenue event and allocation graph.

gross_revenue.description: Gross revenue amount generated by the product or revenue event.

net_revenue.description: Optional net revenue amount after platform fees, taxes, refunds, or other deductions.

revenue_source.description: Optional information about where the revenue was generated.

platform.description: Name of the platform, service, or marketplace.

transaction_reference.description: Optional transaction reference, invoice ID, payment ID, or settlement reference.

allocation_basis.description: Basis used to calculate the royalty allocation graph.

basis_type.description: Primary basis used for this allocation.

audit_record_ids.description: Origin Audit Records used as evidence for this allocation.

origin_asset_ids.description: Origin Assets involved in this allocation.

derivative_asset_ids.description: Derivative Assets involved in this allocation.

contribution_scores.description: Contribution scores used as inputs for allocation.

policy.description: Policy used to convert contribution evidence into allocation rates.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the allocation policy.

allocations.description: Allocation entries distributing revenue to recipients.

recipient_id.description: Identifier, handle, DID, wallet reference, or internal ID of the recipient.

recipient_role.description: Role of the recipient in the allocation graph.

related_asset_id.description: Optional asset ID related to this recipient allocation.

currency.description: Currency used for this allocation entry.

calculation_note.description: Optional note explaining how this allocation was calculated.

settlement_status.description: Settlement status for this allocation entry.

settlement.description: Settlement mechanism for the royalty allocation graph.

payment_reference.description: Optional payment, smart contract, invoice, or transaction reference.

smart_contract_address.description: Optional smart contract address or on-chain reference.

human_review.description: Human review boundary for the royalty allocation graph.

required.description: Whether human review is required before this allocation becomes binding.

reviewed_at.description: Optional timestamp when human review occurred.

trace.description: Trace links for the royalty allocation graph.

source_url.description: Primary URL or repository location of the allocation graph.

related_assets.description: Related assets, audit records, protocols, repositories, or standards.

evidence_hashes.description: Hashes of supporting records, invoices, revenue reports, contracts, or settlement artifacts.
